fato_historico: 1921: Rif War: The Spanish Army suffers its worst military defeat in modern times to the Berbers of the Rif region of Spanish Morocco.
energia_do_dia: Today brings a dynamic energy that may mirror the shifting sands of history, teaching us how resilience can turn a challenging moment into a path for profound growth. It is a good time to embrace your dual nature, adapt to changing landscapes, and consider how your adaptability helps you navigate complex situations with grace and quiet confidence.
frase_do_dia: Strength is often found in the ability to pivot when the tides change.
significado_numero: A powerful number representing mastery and the manifestation of big dreams.
conselho: Stay flexible and keep your mind open to new perspectives throughout this day.
